title: Intune Analytics - Device Inventory

tiles.title: 💻 Devices by Operating System
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Count=count() by OperatingSystem
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 🏭 Devices by Manufacturer
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Count=count() by Manufacturer
| top 10 by Count
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 📱 Top 15 Device Models
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Count=count() by Model, Manufacturer
| top 15 by Count
| project Model, Manufacturer, Count

tiles.title: 🔢 OS Version Distribution (Windows)
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where OperatingSystem has 'Windows'
| summarize Count=count() by OSVersion
| top 10 by Count
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 🔧 Management Agent Types
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Count=count() by ManagementAgent
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: ✅ Compliance by OS
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize 
    Total=count(),
    Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant'),
    NonCompliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'noncompliant')
    by OperatingSystem
| extend ComplianceRate=round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1)
| project OperatingSystem, Compliant, NonCompliant, Total, ComplianceRate
| order by Total desc

tiles.title: 🔐 Encryption by OS
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize 
    Total=count(),
    Encrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == true),
    NotEncrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == false or isnull(IsEncrypted))
    by OperatingSystem
| extend EncryptionRate=round(100.0 * Encrypted / Total, 1)
| project OperatingSystem, Encrypted, NotEncrypted, Total, EncryptionRate
| order by Total desc

tiles.title: 📈 Enrollment Trend (90 days)
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where EnrolledDateTime > ago(90d)
| summarize NewDevices=count() by bin(EnrolledDateTime, 7d)
| order by EnrolledDateTime asc

tiles.title: 📅 Last Sync Distribution
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| extend SyncBucket = case(
    LastSyncDateTime > ago(1d), 'Last 24h',
    LastSyncDateTime > ago(7d), 'Last 7 days',
    LastSyncDateTime > ago(14d), 'Last 14 days',
    LastSyncDateTime > ago(30d), 'Last 30 days',
    'Over 30 days')
| summarize Count=count() by SyncBucket
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 👻 Stale Devices (>14 days)
tiles.query:
StaleDevices(14)
| take 25
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, OperatingSystem, Model, DaysSinceSync, LastSyncDateTime

tiles.title: 🆕 Recently Enrolled (Last 7 days)
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where EnrolledDateTime > ago(7d)
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, OperatingSystem, Model, EnrolledDateTime
| order by EnrolledDateTime desc
| take 20

description: Device inventory overview - OS distribution, manufacturers, models, encryption status, and device lifecycle.
